mapper.select: SELECT us.user_id, us.skill_id, us.level, s.skill_name, s.category, us.created_at FROM user_skills us INNER JOIN skills s ON us.skill_id = s.skill_id WHERE us.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.category, s.skill_name
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_skills WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND skill_id = #{skillId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_skills WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND skill_id = #{skillId}
